# AI Agent Prompt Collection

* Collect AI Agent Prompt(skills, rules, workflow, etc ...)
* All files are generated by AI

## How to add new AI Agent Prompt

1. Run workflow `init-new-tool.md` with AI agent. For example:
  ```
  /init-new-tool my-tool
  ```

2. Manualy add reference files in `mytool/references/` directory. For example:
  ```
  git add submodule https://github.com/example/docs.git
  ```

3. Generate AI agent files. Run `my-tool/antigravity/workflow-update.md`

4. (Optional) Evalute completeness of AI agent files. Run `my-tool/antigravity/workflow-evaluate.md`
